MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. For good cause, the Court does not issue sanctions against the plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to NOV-20-2018 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Self-represented plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to SEP-18-2018 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

*** For good cause, sanction order vacated per Judge Robertson on 7/24/18. ***
